message:
fix(rpc): extract build_prompt_content_blocks and skip empty text block for image-only messages

Extracts a shared build_prompt_content_blocks() helper that both
build_user_message() and run_prompt_with_retry() now use, eliminating
duplicated block-building logic.

The helper also skips adding an empty TextContent block when the text
is empty/whitespace-only, which fixes image-only prompts sending a
spurious empty text block to the model.

New test: build_user_message_image_only_omits_empty_text_block

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
